race.comment: TRUMPTY DUMPTY (9) tackled a Class 3 last start over 1450m at Muswellbrook and found that company a little too strong. Recent efforts in BM58 races have been sound. Gets his chance in what looks a very open affair. COOL SPACE (12) hasn't won in ages but put the writing on the wall last time out when he came from worse than midfield to be beaten just 0.2 lengths over 1100m at Cowra. Small query at today's distance but that latest effort suggested he can run it out. DAMASCUS GATE (1) led all the way for a tough win in a comparable race to this at Muswellbrook two back. Less effective most recently at the mile but is worth another chance coming back in trip. RIVER ROGUE (11) settled last and was unable to get involved over 1100m at Dubbo last start. Can improve over a more suitable journey today. I'M SCARLETT (8) has been racing well at the picnics and is worth throwing in the wider exotics.
